subject: English

lesson.story_mission: Help the Reading Ranger complete the CVC Word Blending trail.
lesson.objective: I can practice cvc word blending with careful listening, reading, or writing.
lesson.concept_explanation: This mission teaches cvc word blending using child-friendly models and short practice steps.
lesson.common_misconception: Learners may answer from a first clue instead of checking the whole word, sentence, or story.
lesson.real_world_connection: Readers and writers use this skill in books, signs, notes, and classroom talk.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read or listen carefully, use the model, then choose or write the answer.
lesson.mini_lesson: First study the model. Then say the sounds or words slowly. Last, check that your answer matches the prompt.

audio.text: Listen, then say it with me.
audio.label: Listen

worked_examples.text: Watch: Use the phonics_tiles model, name the important part, then answer.
Demo: Try one with help before independent practice.

Check your answer with the model.

story.text: Listen to this page. Today you will practice blending CVC words in Skill World. This mission helps you read like a careful first grader. Keep the short vowel sound in the middle before you choose the word. Press Start Mission when you are ready.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This page teaches blending CVC words. Say each sound slowly, then slide the sounds together. The phonics tiles show one consonant, one vowel, and one consonant making a short word. Keep the short vowel sound in the middle before you choose the word. Press Next to continue.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: This page shows a worked example for CVC Word Blending. The phonics tiles show one consonant, one vowel, and one consonant making a short word. First, listen carefully to the model. Next, think about what the question is asking. Then compare the choices or words before deciding. Press Next to continue.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This page lets you try blending CVC words with help. Say each sound slowly, then slide the sounds together. If you feel unsure, use the model and say the sounds, word, or sentence again. Keep the short vowel sound in the middle before you choose the word. Press Next to continue.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: This practice page helps you use blending CVC words on your own. The question may ask you to read, listen, choose, or write. Keep the short vowel sound in the middle before you choose the word. Press Read Question to hear the question, then choose your answer when you are ready.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: This challenge page gives you a little harder practice with blending CVC words. Read or listen to the whole item before you answer. Use the card, sentence, passage, or picture as evidence. Press Read Question if you want to hear the question, then use the hint if you need help.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: This checkpoint page checks how well you can use blending CVC words. Take your time and listen for the important clue. Keep the short vowel sound in the middle before you choose the word. Press Read Question to hear the item, answer carefully, then continue.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: This badge page celebrates your work on blending CVC words. Think about one sound, word, sentence, or story clue you used today. Good readers listen, look back, and try again when something is tricky. Press Next to see your profile.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This profile page shows your Skill World progress. You practiced blending CVC words and used reading strategies like listening, looking closely, and checking your answer. Keep practicing these skills in books and writing. You can go back to the hub when you are finished.
profile.label: Read This Page
